Confidential – Internal Legal & Compliance Memo (HK) – Project SAFFRON
To: Board of Harbor Crest Technologies Limited (HKEx‑listed, code HCT‑X [internal placeholder]) and Mr. Adrian Tso, NED; From: Group Counsel; Date: 30 May
Subject: Proposed acquisition of GreenHarbor Carbon Chain Ltd and concurrent JV with BluePeak Digital Asset Partners SPC; key terms include HKD 128m upfront and a 2‑year earn‑out indexed to verified carbon unit sales; long‑stop 31 Oct and 2% reverse break fee
Inside information assessment: under SFO Part XIVA and Listing Rule 13.09, the cyber and VA licensing status below is likely price‑sensitive and not generally known to persons who commonly invest or deal in our shares
Cyber incident: target reports a credential‑stuffing event on 18 May (internal ticket C‑ 4 1 9 8) affecting 2,130 user records; no client assets moved; this has not been announced to the market and is subject to remediation and SFC engagement
Virtual asset operations: the target operates a pilot DPT order‑book for tokenised REC/VCU products; SFC VATP licence application is in draft; treasury w a l l e t: 0x9f13...b3 (masked) is used for staking yield that will be carved‑out at completion
ESG/climate: the business model tokenises reef‑restoration carbon units; a side letter proposes a HKD 12m price collar if 2 0 2 7 V C U s fail to meet BlueSea Registry Method GR‑09; this commercial term is not to be shared outside the clean team
Information barriers: only the “Pro ject SA FFR ON” clean team may access the data room; an insider list (Appendix A) includes Mr. Adrian Tso, Ms. Lila Ko, and 14 staff (IDs partially masked: H K ‑ Z X 9 1 3 2 ( 4 ), etc.); no onward disclosure except on a need‑to‑know basis
Trading restrictions: effective immediately, the Restricted List is updated and a blackout window applies to Group Digital and Treasury until further notice; any PAs by covered persons in crypto‑exposed securities are prohibited; please avoid tipping or selective disclosure to LPs or vendors
For training only: our public ESG and crypto glossary explains “tokenisation,” “insider list,” and “information barrier” concepts at https://www.harbor-crest.hk/academy (general educational materials; not deal‑specific and not MNPI)
operations note: update vdr folder “04_commercials” with the revised SPA; link: https://intra.harbor-crest.hk/case?id=PRJ-SA FF RON&doc=vdr%2Fspa_v3.pdf; avoid uploading any PII beyond names/roles strictly necessary under PDPO
There has been no material adverse change reported by the vendor since the 15 May Q&A, and no MAC condition is currently triggered under the draft SPA
Public references: please see HKEX’s public ESG guidance “GL‑ESG‑2031” and SFC circular on virtual asset platform risk management (Dec 2025) for background only; these are cited for context and are not inside information
Contact: Group Compliance (Ms. Lila Ko) at compliance@harbor-crest.hk or +852 3 2 1 0 0 0 0 0; report suspected leaks via https://intra.harbor-crest.hk/speakup; all personal data collected will be handled in accordance with the PDPO and our privacy policy
